value.found_quote: ### SDK MCP servers\n\nDefine custom tools directly in your application code instead of running a separate server process.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "SDK MCP servers" that let you "Define custom tools directly in your application code instead of running a separate server process," and notes "MCP servers can ... execute directly within your SDK application." This matches the claim of in-process MCP servers for custom tools defined in application code, presented as a currently available feature.
